prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: You are on a field-service visit to an installed, operating asset, working from symptoms, the work order, and OEM service information. The work under review is Overcurrent device selection & coordination, part of the Electrical scope. The observed field condition is: missing AFCI/GFCI where required. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: NEC 240, 210.8, 210.12, 110.14(C) termination temp ratings. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: Measurement check: Overcurrent device selection & coordination (service call)
